title: chat_using() returns &'static Vec<String> instead of &'static [String]
description: methods.rs chat_using() stores a Vec<String> in OnceLock and returns &'static Vec<String>. Callers only need a slice; returning &'static [String] (via Vec::as_slice) would be more idiomatic Rust and not expose the heap container type. The current signature leaks implementation detail (Vec) through the return type without benefit. Suggested: fn chat_using() -> &'static [String] { ... CHAT_USING_VEC.get_or_init(...) }
